description_long: This is an ornate chandelier with five arms, each supporting a lampshade with a checkered or woven pattern. The central column is adorned with decorative scrollwork and a spherical accent at its midpoint, while each arm curves outward and downward, ending in a globe-shaped bulb holder. The chandelier is suspended from a ceiling mount by a chain or cord, and the overall design features a blend of classical and contemporary elements. The lampshades appear semi-translucent, allowing light to diffuse softly, and the structure is primarily composed of metal with possible glass or acrylic components. Decorative flourishes, such as curled metalwork and spherical finials, enhance its visual appeal, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A decorative five-arm chandelier with checkered-patterned shades, ornate scrollwork, and globe-shaped bulb holders, suspended from a ceiling mount. The design blends classical curves with modern materials for a sophisticated look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five arms, central column, and the symmetrical arrangement of the checkered-patterned shades.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the depth of the scrollwork, with partial visibility of the central column.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shades and the even spacing of the arms, with the central column and ceiling mount clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1 but from the other side, showing the scrollwork and the arrangement of the shades.
